title: Penn, Joanna - Parliamentary Under Secretary of State at the Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities  - ACOBA Advice
body: "Baroness Penn left her role at the Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities in July 2024.  Trustee, Crisis UK  Baroness Penn sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an unpaid appointment with Crisis UK. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in December 2025 and the role was taken up the following month. An accessible version of the correspondence is available here. "
